nasb.text: for you to be accepted—it must be a male without defect from the cattle, the sheep, or the goats.

esv.text: if it is to be accepted for you it shall be a male without blemish, of the bulls or the sheep or the goats.

cnv.text: 就要把沒有殘疾的公牛，或公綿羊，或公山羊獻上，才蒙悅納。

ccb.text: 都必须献毫无残疾的公牛、公绵羊或公山羊才能蒙悦纳。
